Vocabulary - विनयः महात्मनः | Story 10

20 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कश्चन someone / any
पुरत front
संस्थाप्य to be put or placed in
भाति appear as
श्रद्धाजाड्य blind or obstinate adherence to one’s faithfulness
ऋते unless / besides
तेषाम् their [m.n.]
नूतन new

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
ह्यः अत्र कश्चन छत्रं विस्मृतवान् Someone left an umbrella here yesterday.
   
सः वृद्धः इव भाति He looks aged.
सा सन्तुष्टा इति भाति She looks so happy.
   
इतः पर्यन्तं पञ्चविंशतिः तत्त्वानि पठितानि Until now, 25 principles have been studied.
   
तेषाम् आक्षेपाः न स्वीकृताः इति ते सर्वे कुपिताः They feel angry that their complaints were ignored.
   
न, तानि नूतनानि No, those are new ones.
तव नूतनं वाहनम् your new vehicle

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
